video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm wood, Mika Ashbell (feminine young adult, short guild cloak, reinforced leather armor, bright scarf) and Mika Brightford (feminine, rolled-sleeve apron, brass tool belt, ash-marked gloves) standing at a wooden workbench. Mika Ashbell firmly steadies a damaged shield while Mika Brightford carefully guides a repair tool over the surface. Warm forge lighting, cooperative teamwork, no sparks hitting skin, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous forge shot; Mika Brightford taps the final repair mark on the shield with her tool while Mika Ashbell continues to hold the shield steady with a supportive hand. The shield looks restored, friendly atmosphere, clear tool motion, warm forge glow, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The interaction is strictly professional, focusing on collaborative repair work. No sexual content, no dangerous elements, and no text or watermarks included.

timeline_story.selection_reason: Mika Ashbell assists Mika Brightford in repairing gear damaged during the recent goblin boss raid, fostering cooperation.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Collaborating on gear repair builds mutual professional trust.
Appreciates the frontline adventurer's willingness to assist with forge work.
